description: Provides F95 game metadata, RSS-driven update state, and module-owned UI contributions.

contributes.title: F95 Module Settings
contributes.description: Configuration and sync controls for the F95 module.

contributes.title: F95 Fields
contributes.description: Per-game F95 identifiers stored in namespaced metadata tags.

contributes.title: F95 Update Badge
contributes.description: Temporary badge for games with unseen F95 updates.

contributes.title: F95 Focus Panel
contributes.description: Focused game metadata sourced from F95 state.

contributes.title: F95 Detail Panel
contributes.description: Detailed F95 update history and metadata for the selected game.
